calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for Frederick Reid (Executor).

Mr. Marks stated that he filed a supplemental declaration yesterday and that the fees charged were 72% of the statutory attorney fees. The Court granted the petition (signing the order in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
